channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude found 22 vulnerabilities in Firefox over two weeks
item.description: In a recent security partnership with Mozilla, Anthropic found 22 separate vulnerabilities in Firefox — 14 of them classified as "high-severity."

item.title: Microsoft, Google, Amazon say Anthropic Claude remains available to non-defense customers
item.description: Trump's Department of War feud with Anthropic won't impact other companies that are using Claude via Microsoft and Google products.

item.title: From Ukraine to Iran, Hacking Security Cameras Is Now Part of War’s ‘Playbook’
item.description: New research shows hundreds of attempts by apparent Iranian state hackers to hijack consumer-grade cameras, timed to missile and drone strikes. Israel...

item.title: OSHA probing fatality at Rivian warehouse
item.description: A 61-year-old worker died on Thursday after reportedly getting stuck between a tractor trailer and a loading dock.

item.title: 7 Laptop Docking Stations to Unlock the Full Desktop Experience (2026)
item.description: Laptop docking stations expand what your laptop can do, and I’ve been testing the best of the best to see which you should buy.

item.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
item.description: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over i...

item.title: Bill Gates’ TerraPower gets approval to build new nuclear reactor
item.description: It's the first permit to be issued by the Nuclear Regulatory Commission in nearly a decade.

item.title: Posture Correctors That Will Straighten You Out (2026)
item.description: You’re hunched over your desk and phone for hours. I rounded up gadgets, a DIY trick, and even some yoga advice to help you straighten up.

item.title: Why Is Alexa+ So Bad?
item.description: I stuck Amazon’s Echo Show 15 and its Alexa+ AI assistant in my kitchen for a month. Things have not gone well.

item.title: The Smart Bird Feeders Everyone’s Talking About (and Actually Buying) (2026)
item.description: These bird feeders come with cameras and connected apps to let you see and learn about the birds in your neighborhood.
